summary: Core routing and an app shell with sidebar/navigation are implemented, along with an Internet Identity-based auth gate and several UI components (chat composer/message list, charts, gallery card, butterfly background). However, the visual theme deviates from the requested navy/green/black gradient (multiple blue/purple gradients are used), the butterfly animation does not appear to respect prefers-reduced-motion, and chat persistence/back-end storage requirements are not clearly met because the chat implementation shown is localStorage + canned replies without canister persistence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Apply a consistent professional visual theme across all pages using a navy/green/black gradient (no blue-purple heavy palette) with subtle glow accents.
missing_requirements.reason: Multiple components explicitly use blue/purple gradients and blue accents, which conflicts with the requested navy/green/black gradient family and the 'no blue-purple heavy palette' constraint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Butterfly-flying background animation on every page with an option to reduce motion (respect prefers-reduced-motion).
missing_requirements.reason: Butterfly background is implemented and pointer-events are disabled, but there is no detection/handling of prefers-reduced-motion in the shown component.

missing_requirements.requirement: Chat history persists per authenticated user (preferably stored in backend).
missing_requirements.reason: The chat session shown persists to localStorage and generates canned replies client-side, but there is no evidence of saving/loading chat messages via backend canister calls for persistence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend persistence (single Motoko actor) for per-user data: chat conversations/messages, gallery items metadata, and saved analytics reports; frontend reads/writes via canister calls.
missing_requirements.reason: While the backend defines Conversation/Message/GalleryItem types and methods like sendMessage/createConversation (truncated), the frontend chat implementation shown does not use canister calls for persistence (uses localStorage). Also, analytics report persistence is not evidenced in the visible backend snippet.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile setup modal and backend user profile storage/permissions (profile name capture).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not ask for user profiles or a required name setup flow; it only required Internet Identity login and a logged-in indicator.

hallucinated_features.description: Custom access control/authorization system with admin secret token initialization.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not request an authorization framework or secret-token-based admin initialization; it only specified Internet Identity auth and a single-actor backend.
